description: Length-controlled hallucination detection benchmark. Tests on CONCEPTS THE SYSTEM WAS TRAINED ON but with equal-length correct vs hallucinated answers. This measures content-based discrimination (not coverage).
notes: Each test question is from the training KB. Short variants: 1-3 words. Long variants: 6-10 words. Factual and hallucination answers within each length bucket are the same word count. Hallucination answers are plausible-sounding WRONG answers from the KB's distractor lists.

tests.question: What do people use to absorb water?
tests.long_factual: People use a paper towel to absorb water
tests.long_hallucination: People use a metal spoon to eat their soup

tests.question: Where do you store dishes in a kitchen?
tests.long_factual: You store clean dishes in the kitchen cupboard
tests.long_hallucination: You carry your books in a backpack to school

tests.question: What do you use to cut paper?
tests.long_factual: Use a pair of scissors to cut the paper
tests.long_hallucination: You use a metal spoon to eat your breakfast

tests.question: What do you use to boil water?
tests.long_factual: You use an electric kettle to boil water
tests.long_hallucination: You put food on a plate before you eat it

tests.question: What do you use to eat soup?
tests.long_factual: You use a metal spoon to eat hot soup
tests.long_hallucination: You use a fork to eat your salad food

tests.question: What do you use to wash dishes?
tests.long_factual: You need dish soap to wash the dirty dishes
tests.long_hallucination: You spread butter on a slice of bread toast

tests.question: What do you use to dry dishes?
tests.long_factual: Use a clean dry towel to dry the dishes
tests.long_hallucination: You use a sponge to scrub the dirty plates

tests.question: What do you put food in to keep it fresh?
tests.long_factual: Put perishable food in the refrigerator to keep it fresh
tests.long_hallucination: You bake bread in an oven on a high temperature

tests.question: What do you sleep on?
tests.long_factual: You should sleep on a comfortable bed at night
tests.long_hallucination: You sit on a chair while working at your desk

tests.question: What do you sit on?
tests.long_factual: You sit on a chair at the dining room table
tests.long_hallucination: You lie on a bed when you want to sleep well

tests.question: What do you use to tell the time?
tests.long_factual: Look at the wall clock to tell the current time
tests.long_hallucination: You use a ruler to measure the length of a table

tests.question: What do you use to write on paper?
tests.long_factual: You use a pen to write words on a piece of paper
tests.long_hallucination: You use a pencil to draw sketches on paper

tests.question: What do you carry books to school in?
tests.long_factual: Carry your textbooks in a backpack to school each day
tests.long_hallucination: You keep your money in a wallet to pay for things

tests.question: What do you use to measure length?
tests.long_factual: Use a ruler to measure the length of a board
tests.long_hallucination: You step on a scale to check your body weight

tests.question: What do you use to brush your teeth?
tests.long_factual: Use a toothbrush to brush your teeth every morning
tests.long_hallucination: You use a comb to brush your hair every morning

tests.question: What do you wear on your feet?
tests.long_factual: You should wear comfortable shoes on your feet
tests.long_hallucination: You wear warm gloves on your hands in winter

tests.question: What do you wear on your head?
tests.long_factual: You can wear a warm hat on your head outside
tests.long_hallucination: You wear a belt around your waist with pants
